instructions.**/*.dart: Flutter project. Use Material 3. Prefer StatelessWidget. Follow clean architecture.
instructions.**/*.rs: Rust project. Use tracing for logging. Add @trace spec:<name> annotations. Follow existing patterns.
instructions.openspec/**: OpenSpec directory. Never modify specs without user approval. Specs converge toward intent, not code.
instructions.**/*.sh: Shell script. Use set -euo pipefail. Log warnings to stderr. Never silently suppress errors.
